title: polyscias baehniana
intro: Polyscias baehniana, also known as the Baehni's tree or Polyscias, is a plant species belonging to the Araliaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Polyscias baehniana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic, while also possessing antiviral and antifungal properties. Polyscias baehniana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
